_comment: RELEASE CONTROL — which rungs are advertised on the landing page.
Edit 'released' and push. No build step, no code change. The landing page
fetches this file at load and renders only what is listed, in this order.
IMPORTANT AND HONEST: this is a SOFT release gate. It controls what is
ADVERTISED, not what exists. An unlisted rung is still deployed and still
reachable by anyone who types its URL directly. That is fine for pacing a
family's learning; it is NOT privacy or access control.
For a HARD gate — the files genuinely not on the internet — keep the rung on
a branch and merge it to main only at release. See README, 'Releasing a rung'.
pacing_note: Invaders only for now. Breakout is built, verified and waiting — release it when Invaders has been played out. One game at a time means the lessons land instead of blurring together.
